Unique identifier of practice 2 Char 11
IN_PATIENT Total costs for inpatient hospital facility services Per capita cost for attributed beneficiary, Inpatient Hospital Facility Services category 3 Num 8 Populated only for records with Inpatient_stay not equal to missing
MSPB_EPISODE Episode for MSPB measure Indicator for whether record corresponds to episode for Medicare Spending per Beneficiary (MSPB) measure 4 Num 8 Equals 1 if record corresponds to episode for Medicare Spending per
